steps.1: Enter your provider credentials in Settings
steps.4: The AI listens and gives feedback when it detects a pause

sidebar.apiKeyHint: Add your provider credentials in Settings first

apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
apiKey.formatError: This doesn't look like an OpenAI API key (should start with sk-)
apiKey.encryptionWarning: Encryption unavailable — key stored in plain text

sessionToken.label: AWS Session Token
sessionToken.hint: Leave blank when using long-term IAM credentials.

analysisModel.label: Background Analysis Model
analysisModel.hint: Used for the periodic composition analysis pass (OpenAI Responses API).

analysisWindow.label: Analysis Window (seconds)
analysisWindow.hint: How often to run a deep composition analysis. Min 20s, max 60s.

outputMode.label: Output Mode
outputMode.audioWarning: ⚠ Audio output uses significantly more tokens than text (~10–20× depending on response length). Monitor your usage carefully.

silenceTimeout.label: Silence Timeout (seconds)
silenceTimeout.hint: Stop streaming after this many seconds of silence to avoid wasting tokens.

systemPrompt.label: System Prompt
systemPrompt.placeholder: Describe how you want the AI to give feedback on your music...
systemPrompt.tooLong: System prompt is very long and may be truncated by the API. Keep it under 4000 characters.

autoDetect.label: Auto-detect sound
autoDetect.title: Automatically start streaming when audio is detected on the selected source

voicePrompt.hint: Speak to ask the AI questions about your audio

errors.deviceConflict: Voice prompt mic and audio source must be different devices.

transcript.title: Conversation
transcript.emptyState: Start streaming audio to receive feedback
transcript.emptyHint: The AI will respond when it detects a pause in the audio

messageInput.placeholder: Ask a question about your music… (Enter to send)
